parameters.name: Table
parameters.helpText: Table unique_id, _id, or name. Used when updating a single table.

parameters.name: Tables
parameters.helpText: Array of table references (unique_id, _id, or name). When provided, the action will be applied to all tables.

parameters.name: Action
parameters.helpText: Action to perform. Supported: addfield, updatefield, removefield, renametable, updatetableprops.

parameters.name: Field
parameters.helpText: Field unique_id or column_name. Required for updatefield and removefield.

parameters.name: FieldPayload
parameters.helpText: Full field definition object. Must include column_name and data_type when creating fields.

parameters.name: ColumnName
parameters.helpText: Field column name. Used when FieldPayload is not provided or to override it.

parameters.name: DataType
parameters.helpText: Field data type (String, Integer, Boolean, Date, etc).

parameters.name: Value
parameters.helpText: Optional default value for the field.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.helpText: New table name. Used for renametable or updatetableprops.

parameters.name: SingleName
parameters.helpText: Singular version of the table name.
